---
format: 
  revealjs:
    css: ../styles.css
    slide-number: c/t
    show-slide-number: all
    preview-links: auto
    self-contained: true
    multiplex: false
    incremental: true
    progress: true
    history: true
    hash-type: number
    logo: ../img/rabo_icon_color.png
    theme: "../rabo.scss"
    code-block-background: true
    highlight-style: ayu-mirage
    code-link: false
    code-copy: true
    pagetitle: "RABO Avoidance & Mitigation"
    author-meta: "Marcia Grefsrud"
    date-meta: "2026-05-01"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

::: {.my-title}

## [<br> Foothill Yellow-Legged Frog <br> Avoidance, Minimization & Mitigation]{.r-fit-text}{background-image="../img/rabo_adult_dark_transparent.png" background-size="contain" background-position="bottom" background-opacity="0.25"}

<br>
Marcia Grefsrud | Environmental Scientist, CDFW

![](../img/CDFW-Insignia-146x193.png){.absolute bottom="0" right="0" width="100"}

:::

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide2.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide3.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide4.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide5.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide6.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide7.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide8.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide9.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide10.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide11.png"  background-size="98%"}
 
##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide12.png"  background-size="98%"}
 
##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide13.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide14.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide15.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide16.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide17.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide18.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide19.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide20.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide21.png"  background-size="98%"}

##  {background-image="../img/mg_2026_mitigation/Slide22.png"  background-size="98%"}
